title: PowerShell whisper.cpp build script

context.goal: Mirror scripts/build-whisper.sh on Windows. Produce whisper-cli.exe in src-tauri/binaries plus a sidecar copy named whisper-cli-<rust-target-triple>.exe so Tauri sidecar lookup works.
prereqs_on_host: Visual Studio 2022 Build Tools with C++ workload (provides cl.exe + Windows SDK)
rustup-installed Rust toolchain (for rustc -vV target detection)
Optional: Vulkan SDK (LunarG) for VULKAN=1 path

env_vars.name: WHISPER_REF
env_vars.purpose: Git ref to checkout in whisper.cpp clone

steps: If not Test-Path "$BuildDir/whisper.cpp/.git": git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/ggerganov/whisper.cpp "$BuildDir/whisper.cpp"
Build cmake flags array: -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DBUILD_SHARED_LIBS=OFF -DWHISPER_BUILD_TESTS=OFF -DWHISPER_BUILD_EXAMPLES=ON. Append -DGGML_VULKAN=ON if $env:VULKAN -eq '1'
Run: cmake -B build @flags ; cmake --build build -j --config Release
Locate produced exe: probe build/bin/Release/whisper-cli.exe then build/bin/whisper-cli.exe then build/Release/whisper-cli.exe
Copy-Item to $BinDir/whisper-cli.exe AND to $BinDir/whisper-cli-<triple>.exe where <triple> = (rustc -vV | Select-String 'host:').Line.Split(' ')[1]

dll_handling.problem: Vulkan or future shared-lib builds may emit ggml-*.dll alongside the exe. CPU-only static build should not.
dll_handling.action: After copy, glob $BuildDir/whisper.cpp/build/bin/Release/*.dll and copy any matches into $BinDir. Document this in script header comment.

acceptance: Running scripts/build-whisper.ps1 from clean checkout produces src-tauri/binaries/whisper-cli.exe (size > 1MB)
VULKAN=1 path completes when Vulkan SDK installed (skip in CI without SDK)
Script exits non-zero on any cmake/git/copy failure
